## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Also list any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Build system or CI/CD change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] The code builds cleanly (`make all` or `make check` passes)
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`make test` and/or CI passes)
- [ ] New tests have been added for new functionality
- [ ] The code follows the project's coding style (`make format` / `make format-check`)
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (if applicable):
  - Inline code comments for non-trivial logic
  - `docs/` files for new subsystems, drivers, or syscalls
  - `ARCHITECTURE.md` for significant architectural changes
- [ ] The PR title and description are clear and descriptive

## Testing Done

Describe the testing you performed:
- [ ] Built and booted in QEMU (`make run`)
- [ ] Ran unit tests (`make test`)
- [ ] Ran E2E tests (`make e2e`)
- [ ] Tested on real hardware (please describe)

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Include serial output, boot logs, or screenshots showing the change in action.

## Additional Notes

Any other information that reviewers should know about this change.
